name: Cheese Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shredded Sharp Or Mild Cheddar Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the peanut butter, shredded cheese, softened butter, flour, and salt. Mix well.
2. Cover and chill for 1 hour.
3. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
4. Place spoonfuls of the dough about 2 inches apart on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
Makes 2 dozen
